suggested_actions: Exclude this test from critical AE alerting path

decision_log.decision: Recommend suppression — known noise, wrong alert routing
decision_log.rationale: This test failure is a known issue managed by the experimentation team. It should not route to AE on-call. Recommend excluding from the critical alerting path to reduce alert fatigue.
alternatives_considered: escalate_to_owner — but suppression is more appropriate since team is already aware
